title: Maal Lah
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MultipleIssues|citation|expand}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Maal Lah |homeworld=[[Domain Lah worldship]] |birth= |death=[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |caste=[[Warrior caste]] |domain=[[Domain Lah]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You have matters well in hand, my servant. But I doubt that is what you wished to report.''"
"''I would never disturb you only to report that I am performing as you expect, Great Warmaster.|Tsavong Lah and Maal Lah|''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''}} '''Maal Lah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|Warrior]] and crèche-brother to [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]. He served as [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. ==Biography== Maal Lah was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] of the [[Warrior caste]]. A member of [[Domain Lah]] and crèche-brother to [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], Maal Lah was [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of one of the fleets the Yuuzhan Vong sent during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. While he normally favored bold assaults, he had to tone down his attacks because of the forces present. With the successful conquest, Maal Lah was [[Escalation|escalated]] to [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]], and became one of Tsavong Lah's tactical advisors during the Battles of Borleias. After learning of [[Wyrpuuk Cha]]'s failure, Maal became convinced that [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] was the one who coordinated the battle. Maal Lah was later sent to [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], where he had the difficult task of bringing the [[Peace Brigade]] forces into line. He was present during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|Raid on Ylesia]], where his leg was damaged beyond repair. He endured the pain and said the [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] would give him a new leg, if the [[Yun'o|gods]] favored him. However, he was crushed to [[Death/Legends|death]] by the falling rubble of a nearby building. ==Personality and traits== Unlike other members of Domain Lah, Maal did not possess a single scar on his body, but instead chose to tattoo himself with blue and red swirls. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Maal Lah |es=Maal Lah }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Lah, Maal}} [[Category:Domain Lah]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong senior officers]]
